summary: All 7 CP1 checks passed. Migration upgrade, downgrade, constraints, and model imports are all clean.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Alembic upgrade head
checks.command: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && alembic upgrade head

checks.name: CHECK-02: 9 tables exist
checks.actual: account_health_log, account_health_state, approval_grants, crawled_posts, plan_runs, plan_steps, plans, product_contexts, step_runs, theme_results, alembic_version

checks.name: CHECK-03: theme_results.dominant_sentiment
checks.command: cd backend && sqlite3 app.db ".schema theme_results" | grep -i dominant_sentiment
checks.actual: dominant_sentiment column and CHECK constraint present

checks.name: CHECK-04: account_health_state session fields
checks.command: cd backend && sqlite3 app.db ".schema account_health_state" | grep -E "session_status|account_id_hash"

checks.name: CHECK-05: plan_steps.action_type constraint
checks.command: cd backend && sqlite3 app.db ".schema plan_steps" | grep -i action_type
checks.expected: All 5 action_type values present in CHECK constraint
checks.actual: CRAWL_FEED, JOIN_GROUP, CRAWL_COMMENTS, CRAWL_GROUP_META, SEARCH_GROUPS present

checks.name: CHECK-06: Migration roundtrip
checks.command: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && alembic downgrade base && alembic upgrade head
